source_pr.title: statement table: fixed issue #32156 time_zone not sync in stmt table
source_pr.body:

### What problem does this PR solve?

-->

Problem Summary:


symptoms: r := tk.MustQuery("select FIRST_SEEN, LAST_SEEN from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATEMENTS_SUMMARY_HISTORY order by LAST_SEEN limit 1;") (infoschema/cluster_tables_test.go)
failure_signature: r := tk.MustQuery("select FIRST_SEEN, LAST_SEEN from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATEMENTS_SUMMARY_HISTORY order by LAST_SEEN limit 1;") (infoschema/cluster_tables_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: r := tk.MustQuery("select FIRST_SEEN, LAST_SEEN from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATEMENTS_SUMMARY_HISTORY order by LAST_SEEN limit 1;") (infoschema/cluster_tables_test.go)
